name: Phase4-Codex-Harness-MVP

checklist.summary: 用户确认 checklist 没问题，可以进入 todolist 生成阶段。

tested.summary: Phase4 current-environment, installed-provider, Chrome E2E, and fixed-provider HTTP regression executed. Codex MVP path passed. OpenClaw execution passed after Node v22.22.3 and gateway port 18790 fixes. Hermes real chat passed after default model was changed to deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash.

done.summary: 用户确认 Phase4-Codex-Harness-MVP 已经验收完成，可以关闭。

notes: Product clarification completed: target user=A, core value=A, scope=B, success=B; MVP target=A, trace level=B, office identity=B, non-goal=A.
Checklist generated and awaiting user confirmation. Do not create todolist.md before checklist confirmation.

Testing split agreed at 2026-06-07T23:48:08+08:00: Codex/current-environment checks can run first; OpenClaw/Hermes regression checks require user to install/provide environments when regression testing starts.

2026-06-08 regression: discovered OpenClaw main, Hermes default, and Codex local through server APIs. Fixed OpenClaw providerKind default regression in workspace capability checks. Codex communication/history/chat passed. OpenClaw communication failed first because openclaw CLI was not in PATH; Chrome E2E with Node 22 path found OpenClaw but it requires Node.js v22.19+ while available Node is v22.17.1. Gateway 18789 is still not a valid WebSocket/HTTP target. Hermes communication reached CLI/session but failed because configured model anthropic/claude-opus-4.6 is rejected by the active backend, which supports deepseek-v4-pro/deepseek-v4-flash.

2026-06-08 Chrome E2E: page loaded in Chrome at http://127.0.0.1:8097/. Browser-side fetch verified agents/status/platforms/workspace/communication/history/agent-chat. Result saved at /tmp/chrome-e2e-result.json and screenshot at /tmp/virtual-office-chrome-e2e.png.

2026-06-08 fixed-provider regression: removed _VO_INT from start.sh to avoid demo/internal mode display. Switched local Node default to v22.22.3 for OpenClaw 2026.6.1. Moved OpenClaw gateway from 18789 to 18790 because 18789 was occupied by Cursor NodeService, reinstalled/restarted the gateway, and verified connectivity. Set Hermes default model to deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash. Final VO HTTP regression passed for Codex, OpenClaw, and Hermes communication/history/agent-chat paths.
2026-06-09 user confirmed final acceptance and requested the Phase 4 requirement be closed.
